title: centaurea palanganensis
intro: Centaurea palanganensis, also known as Palangan Knapweed, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Iran. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Centaurea palanganensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
